summary: Frontend testing of Carrousel Actualités Générales feature. All 6 carousel features tested and verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Carousel implementation in ActualitesManager.jsx (lines 550-760) is well structured
localStorage used for persisting read state per user (key: actualites_lues_{userId})
Navigation dots only show if actualités count <= 10 (good UX decision)
Admin (Directeur) view shows grouped Actualités Ciblées without carousel - intentional design
seed_data_creation: None - using existing 5 actualités in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carousel Actualités feature fully implemented and tested. All navigation, counters, badges working correctly. localStorage persists read state per user.

counter_display.details: Counter shows 'X / Y' format (e.g., '1 / 5', '2 / 5', '3 / 5') and updates correctly with navigation

navigation_next.details: Right arrow (ChevronRight) advances to next actualité, counter updates from '1/5' to '2/5'

navigation_previous.details: Left arrow (ChevronLeft) goes to previous actualité, counter returns from '2/5' to '1/5'

navigation_dots.details: 5 dots displayed for 5 actualités. Clicking dot navigates directly to that item. Active dot has extended width

unread_badge.details: Blue badge with number shows '5 actualités non lues' with animated pulse effect

nouveau_badge.details: 'NOUVEAU' badge displayed on unread news cards with blue/emerald background

mark_as_read.details: Clicking on card or dot marks actualité as read. Read state persisted to localStorage. Unread count decreases accordingly

states.currentGeneralIndex: Tracks current position in general actualités carousel
states.currentCibleIndex: Tracks current position in targeted actualités carousel
states.actualitesLues: Array of read actualité IDs, loaded from localStorage on mount

functions.marquerCommeLue: Adds actualité ID to read list and persists to localStorage
functions.estNonLue: Returns true if actualité ID is not in read list

ui_elements.arrows: w-10 h-10 rounded-full buttons with ChevronLeft/ChevronRight icons
ui_elements.dots: w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full buttons, active dot has w-6 extended width

mocked_apis.note: All tested APIs are real integrations - no mocked endpoints
